## Fix Priority Queue

### PRIORITY 1: HIGH Violations (1 fix)

#### Fix #1: RENAV-001 - Navigation Height (HIGH)

**Component:** `src/components/realestate/RENav.jsx`
**Line:** 35
**Severity:** HIGH (-10 points)
**Issue:** Navigation bar height is 68px instead of standard 70px

**Before:**
```jsx
<div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 md:px-12 h-[68px]">
```

**After:**
```jsx
<div className="flex items-center justify-between px-8 md:px-16 lg:px-24 h-[70px]">
```

**Design Token Reference:**
```yaml
layout:
  nav:
    height: "h-[70px]"  # Standard navigation height
    horizontal_padding: "px-8 md:px-16 lg:px-24"  # Standard horizontal spacing
```

**Edit Command:**
```javascript
Edit(
  file_path: "/Users/lgzlholding/Documents/dev-website Templates_cloning from ai/Projects/004 Zillio/neom-vision-template/src/components/realestate/RENav.jsx",
  old_string: `<div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 md:px-12 h-[68px]">`,
  new_string: `<div className="flex items-center justify-between px-8 md:px-16 lg:px-24 h-[70px]">`
)
```

**Note:** This fix also resolves RENAV-002 (horizontal padding violation) in the same line.


#### Fix #8: REFOOTER-002 - Footer Horizontal Padding (MEDIUM)

**Component:** `src/components/realestate/REFooter.jsx`
**Line:** 21
**Severity:** MEDIUM (-6 points)
**Issue:** Footer padding px-8 md:px-16 lg:px-24 instead of standard px-8 md:px-20

**Before:**
```jsx
<div className="relative px-8 md:px-16 lg:px-24 pt-16 pb-20 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-10">
```

**After:**
```jsx
<div className="relative px-8 md:px-20 py-16 md:py-20 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-10">
```

**Design Token Reference:**
```yaml
spacing:
  sections:
    horizontal_footer: "px-8 md:px-20"  # Footer specific horizontal padding

components:
  footer:
    links_section: "px-8 md:px-20 py-16 md:py-20"  # Combined padding
```

**Edit Command:**
```javascript
Edit(
  file_path: "/Users/lgzlholding/Documents/dev-website Templates_cloning from ai/Projects/004 Zillio/neom-vision-template/src/components/realestate/REFooter.jsx",
  old_string: `<div className="relative px-8 md:px-16 lg:px-24 pt-16 pb-20 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-10">`,
  new_string: `<div className="relative px-8 md:px-20 py-16 md:py-20 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-10">`
)
```

**Note:** This fix also resolves REFOOTER-003 (vertical padding asymmetry) by converting pt-16 pb-20 to py-16 md:py-20.

### Option B: Interactive Review (Safe)

Run the interactive bash script:

```bash

./fix_script_REHome.sh
```

This script will:
1. Display each fix with before/after code
2. Prompt for approval (y/n) for each fix
3. Generate Edit commands for approved fixes
4. Provide execution summary
